raw.message: Get New Characters and Fight Some Spectacular Battles

hook.summary: Goku SSJ3 performs his iconic Dragon Fist attack.
hook.visual_action: Goku charges energy and punches forward, summoning a massive golden dragon.

scene_flow: Goku SSJ3 charges up and shouts while preparing his signature move.
A golden energy dragon emerges from Goku's punch and spirals toward the enemy.
The dragon constricts and pierces through the giant boss Hirudegarn.
A massive explosion of light occurs as the attack connects.
End card displays the game logo, character art, and a Play Now button.
on_screen_text: *The images are the characters' forms after Dokkan Awakening.
*The images are the characters' forms after activating a skill.
*Some characters featured in the video may not be available at certain times of the year.
audience_proxy: Male anime fans and Dragon Ball enthusiasts aged 18-35 who enjoy high-intensity battle animations.
